prompt:
Pull out the sentence in the following 5x7 block of text. Read from left to right and use all of the letters in order:

THESE
AGULL
GLIDE
DPEAC
EFULL
YTOMY
CHAIR
expected: The seagull glided peacefully to my chair.
actual: Reading all 35 letters left to right, row by row: THESEAGULLGLIDEDPEACEFULLYTOMYCHAIR — the sentence is "THE SEAGULL GLIDED PEACEFULLY TO MY CHAIR."
finish_summary: Reading all 35 letters left to right, row by row: THESEAGULLGLIDEDPEACEFULLYTOMYCHAIR — the sentence is "THE SEAGULL GLIDED PEACEFULLY TO MY CHAIR."
